SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF RACHELLE MORSE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIN WEIMIN IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER TONY LIN (SON). THE INTERPRETER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK R. SAHATJIAN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
